title: Four small CI fixes:
body:
1) 'podman system info' (in logcollector): has been silently
     failing in special_testing_rootless, with:
       logcollector.sh: line 16: podman: command not found
     Use ./bin/podman instead of just podman; this is probably
     the right thing to do in the general case anyway

  2) logformatter: highlight 'panic:', seen in bindings test:
        https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/6693715108429824/html/integration_test.log.html

  3) logformatter: handle Unicode bullet in front of 'Running',
     seen in bindings test.

  4) logformatter: turn down contrast on BATS 'ok' results,
     for legibility

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: Will need to rebase once #5514 merges
LGTM once CI is once again ready to merge things

Confirmed:
* podman_system_info: working in rootless ([local](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6139560778268672?command=podman_system_info#L1) and [remote](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5013660871426048?command=podman_system_info#L1)); also in all other CI results that I checked.
* bullet-in-front-of-Running filter: [working](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/5682163941113856/html/integration_test.log.html).
* BATS test contrast: [working](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/6561773243334656/html/system_test.log.html)
* lower-case 'panic': cannot test, because bindings test didn't flake this time.
@rhatdan I rebased an hour ago against master with the #5514 systemd CI fix. I see no commits since then. Current failures are the usual conmon flake; I've restarted both.
